title: blephilia ciliata
intro: Blephilia ciliata, also known as eastern fairy bell, is a perennial plant native to eastern North America, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Blephilia ciliata include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential.
